metadata.name: Y8S1 Prototype System
publicDisplayPolicy: Show only on eligible non-exotic gear and weapons.
Do not show source labels on public cards.

summary: Prototype rolls and Prototype Augments apply to eligible non-exotic gear and weapons. Exotics are excluded.
weaponRollNotes: Eligible non-exotic weapons can use prototype weapon stat rolls.
Prototype weapon attributes are tracked separately from standard weapon attributes.
gearRollNotes: Eligible non-exotic gear can use prototype core, minor attribute, and mod-value rolls where the system allows them.
Brand and gear set reference cards describe eligibility for gear pieces using those sets.

augments.name: Amalgam
augments.description: 2.5% chance for bullets to apply a random status effect

augments.name: Anomaly
augments.description: Heal for 5% of the damage dealt by skills

augments.name: Atomize
augments.description: 22.5% increased explosion range for any explosives

augments.name: Echo
augments.description: 4.5% chance to duplicate the damage of the last bullet fired

augments.name: Entropy
augments.description: Converts 15% of Armor to HP. (Bonus Armor does not count)

augments.name: Paradox
augments.description: 6.5% chance to refill your magazine by 2 for each bullet spent

augments.name: Quantum
augments.description: 3% chance to become immune to damage for 2 seconds on taking damage

augments.name: Synesthesia
augments.description: 4.5% chance that every shot that hits the target reduces your active cooldowns by 0.2 seconds

augments.name: Trapper
augments.description: 24% increased duration of applied CC effects
